pattern: An inorder walk visits the whole left subtree, then the node, then the whole right subtree — the iterative form replaces the call stack with an explicit one.
hints: For each node the values come out in the order: left subtree, then this node, then right subtree.
A plain recursion writes this directly; the base case is the empty (None) subtree.
To do it without recursion, push left children onto a stack, pop to emit a value, then dive into that node's right child.

edge_inputs.description: right-leaning with a left child — order is value, left, right interleaved correctly
left-skewed chain so the stack must unwind fully before any right child

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
